intro: Product Engineer → Senior → Technical Lead at TrusTrace over six years, preceded by automotive and IoT work at Altran / FCA.

rows.title: Technical Lead

for faster releases and decoupled deploys, with the surrounding tooling so teams ship independently. Built integrated admin modules —

rows.title: Product Engineer → Senior Software Engineer
paragraphs: Joined a 20-person team on the fashion traceability platform — initially hands-on across modules with product owners, designers and QA, owning end-to-end delivery plus ops. Then led the platform's extension into a
for a major Swedish food retailer: a retailer–supplier sustainability-data collaboration platform on Angular +
+ Node.js +
. Built the data-collection + score-calculation platform — brand-facing UI for suppliers to upload sustainability data, consumer-facing API consumed by the retailer's app where shoppers
. Resolves 10 sustainability parameters (biodiversity, climate, …) into a spider chart;

paragraphs.em: authored the foundational pseudocode for the parameter calculations

performance optimisation.
